allow: PowerShell(Get-ChildItem -Recurse -File | Select-Object @{n='Path';e={$_.FullName.Replace\('D:\\MINOR WITH TAGUCHI\\',''\)}}, Length, LastWriteTime | Sort-Object Path | Format-Table -AutoSize)

PowerShell("<<CHK>>"; "RF_PARAMS in app.py: " + \(Select-String -Path app.py -Pattern 'RF_PARAMS' -SimpleMatch | Measure-Object\).Count; "RF_PARAMS in config.py: " + \(Select-String -Path config.py -Pattern 'RF_PARAMS' -SimpleMatch | Measure-Object\).Count; "<<DONE>>")
PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; $env:PYTHONUTF8='1'; python -c "import config; print\([n for n in dir\(config\) if 'TAG' in n.upper\(\)]\)")
PowerShell($env:PYTHONIOENCODING='utf-8'; $env:PYTHONUTF8='1'; python -c "import config; print\(config.__file__\); print\([n for n in dir\(config\) if not n.startswith\('__'\)]\)")
PowerShell($env:PYTHONUTF8='1'; python -c "import config; print\('FILE', config.__file__\); print\('NAMES', sorted\(n for n in dir\(config\) if not n.startswith\('__'\)\)\)")
PowerShell($env:PYTHONUTF8='1'; python -c "import config; print\('FILE', config.__file__\)" 2>&1 | Out-String)
PowerShell(python -c "import config; print\('HAS_TAG=' + str\(hasattr\(config,'TAGUCHI_LEVELS'\)\) + ' HAS_L9=' + str\(hasattr\(config,'TAGUCHI_L9'\)\)\)")
PowerShell(python -c "import config; names=[n for n in dir\(config\) if not n.startswith\('_'\)]; print\(' '.join\(names\)\)")
PowerShell($f = Get-Item config.py; "Size=$\($f.Length\) Modified=$\($f.LastWriteTime\)"; "Lines=" + \(Get-Content config.py | Measure-Object -Line\).Lines)
Bash(cat "/mnt/d/MINOR WITH TAGUCHI/_bench.txt" 2>/dev/null | tail -n +2 || echo NO)
PowerShell($env:PYTHONUTF8='1'; python _bench.py 2>$null; "---"; if \(Test-Path _bench.txt\) { Get-Content _bench.txt -Encoding utf8 } else { "no file" })
PowerShell($env:PYTHONUTF8='1'; python -c "import py_compile as p; [p.compile\(f,doraise=True\) for f in ['config.py','train.py','app.py','taguchi_analysis.py']]; print\('COMPILE_OK'\)")
